current_goal: Move from approved architecture to deployable parser and Telegram bot workers for Smart Grocery Assistant.
current_task: A global benchmark and strategic roadmap have been added so the project can evolve from a merely working bot into a world-class Telegram-first grocery copilot with grounded baskets, health/composition reasoning, household memory, and local price intelligence.
next_step: Convert `docs/WORLD_CLASS_ROADMAP_2026.md` into the next engineering backlog by prioritizing P0/P1: grounded answer contracts, category read-models, real basket quality, and stronger health/composition reasoning.
blockers: Live user retests still show that the bot can transport a reply but not yet consistently solve the shopping task at a world-class level.

Parsed catalog coverage and category semantics remain too weak for several staple commodity terms (`масло`, `молоко`, `торт`, `гречка`, `яйца`, `хлеб`), which limits both basket quality and AI planning.
